Model before rewriting:

letting n be 6
letting N be domain int(1..(n))
find board: matrix indexed by [N, N] of int(0..2)
find amountOfQueens: int(1..((product([n,n;int(1..)]) / 2)))

such that

sum([ sum([ toInt(board[row, col] = 1) | col : N ]) | row : N ]) = amountOfQueens,
sum([ sum([ toInt(board[row, col] = 2) | col : N ]) | row : N ]) = amountOfQueens,
and([ (board[row, col] = 1) -> (and([ and([and([and([and([and([(i != row) -> (board[i, col] < 2),(i != col) -> (board[row, i] < 2);int(1..)]),(and([sum([row,i;int(1..)]) <= n,sum([col,i;int(1..)]) <= n;int(1..)])) -> (board[sum([row,i;int(1..)]), sum([col,i;int(1..)])] < 2);int(1..)]),(and([(row - i) > 0,(col - i) > 0;int(1..)])) -> (board[(row - i), (col - i)] < 2);int(1..)]),(and([sum([row,i;int(1..)]) <= n,(col - i) > 0;int(1..)])) -> (board[sum([row,i;int(1..)]), (col - i)] < 2);int(1..)]),(and([(row - i) > 0,sum([col,i;int(1..)]) <= n;int(1..)])) -> (board[(row - i), sum([col,i;int(1..)])] < 2);int(1..)]) | i : N ])) | row : N, col : N ]),
and([ (board[row, col] = 2) -> (and([ and([and([and([and([and([(j != row) -> (or([board[j, col] < 1,board[j, col] > 1;int(1..)])),(j != col) -> (or([board[row, j] < 1,board[row, j] > 1;int(1..)]));int(1..)]),(and([sum([row,j;int(1..)]) <= n,sum([col,j;int(1..)]) <= n;int(1..)])) -> (or([board[sum([row,j;int(1..)]), sum([col,j;int(1..)])] < 1,board[sum([row,j;int(1..)]), sum([col,j;int(1..)])] > 1;int(1..)]));int(1..)]),(and([(row - j) > 0,(col - j) > 0;int(1..)])) -> (or([board[(row - j), (col - j)] < 1,board[(row - j), (col - j)] > 1;int(1..)]));int(1..)]),(and([sum([row,j;int(1..)]) <= n,(col - j) > 0;int(1..)])) -> (or([board[sum([row,j;int(1..)]), (col - j)] < 1,board[sum([row,j;int(1..)]), (col - j)] > 1;int(1..)]));int(1..)]),(and([(row - j) > 0,sum([col,j;int(1..)]) <= n;int(1..)])) -> (or([board[(row - j), sum([col,j;int(1..)])] < 1,board[(row - j), sum([col,j;int(1..)])] > 1;int(1..)]));int(1..)]) | j : N ])) | row : N, col : N ])

i) > 0,(1 - i) > 0;int(1..)])) -> (board#matrix_to_atom[(1 - i), (1 - i)] < 2);int(1..)]),(and([sum([1,i;int(1..)]) <= 6,(1 - i) > 0;int(1..)])) -> (board#matrix_to_atom[sum([1,i;int(1..)]), (1 - i)] < 2);int(1..)]),(and([(1 -
